title: Gate Review Record
description: The formal record of a gate review, capturing criteria checked, waivers granted, outcome, and conditions for proceeding.

id.description: Unique gate review record identifier (e.g. GR-A-001)

phase.description: Lifecycle phase at which this gate review occurs

review_date.description: Date the gate review was conducted (ISO 8601)

reviewer.description: Person or role who conducted the gate review

evidence.description: Reference to evidence supporting the pass or waiver decision

criteria_checked.description: List of gate criteria and their individual results

approved_by.description: Person or role who approved the waiver

expiry_date.description: Date when the waiver expires and must be reviewed

residual_risk.description: Residual risk accepted by granting this waiver

waivers.description: Formal waivers granted during this gate review

next_gate_conditions.description: Conditions that must be met before the next gate review

deferred_to.description: If deferred, the date by which the gate review must be repeated

notes.description: Additional notes from the gate reviewer
